label.purpose: Eyebrows, nav, tech stacks, the ticker — all metadata.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Scroll-in fade/translate and button hovers. Ease-out, never bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single filled gold action per view (GitHub).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:#C9A227; color:#0B0B0C; padding:12px 24px; border-radius:2px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; transition:background .18s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1),transform .18s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#A9871C; transform:translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #C9A227; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:transparent; color:#ECE7DD; padding:12px 24px; border:1px solid #847E73; border-radius:2px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; transition:color .18s,border-color .18s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color:#C9A227; border-color:#C9A227; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #C9A227; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Live-status pill with a pulsing green dot.
components.css: .ds-status-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:#111113; color:#ECE7DD; padding:6px 14px; border-radius:9999px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.75rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; } .ds-dot { width:7px; height:7px; border-radius:9999px; background:#5FB87A; animation:ds-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.4} } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){ .ds-dot{animation:none} }

components.name: Chat Input
components.css: .ds-input-chat { background:#111113; color:#ECE7DD; padding:14px 16px; border:1px solid #847E73; border-radius:2px; font-family:'Hanken Grotesk',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:1rem; width:100%; } .ds-input-chat::placeholder { color:#978F82; } .ds-input-chat:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #C9A227; outline-offset:2px; border-color:#C9A227; }

components.name: Skill Chip
components.description: Static skill tag in the About cluster.
components.css: .ds-chip { display:inline-block; background:transparent; color:#978F82; padding:6px 12px; border:1px solid #1B1B1E; border-radius:2px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.75rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; }

narrative.overview: The personal site of an engineer who reads type specimens for fun. It carries itself like a well-set technical journal printed on near-black stock: a single warm gold ink used sparingly, a high-contrast serif for the name, monospace for the marginalia, and a clean grotesque for the running text. Depth comes from a faint graph-paper grid and generous vertical rhythm, never from boxes, shadows, or chrome. It works outward from type and space; the one moment of motion-as-spectacle is the Lanyard badge swinging on its physics in the hero.
keyCharacteristics: Tinted near-black canvas (#0B0B0C), never pure black, under a faint graph-paper grid.
One gold accent (#C9A227), spent rarely and deliberately.
High-contrast serif display + monospace labels + grotesque body.
Hierarchy from scale, weight, and whitespace; almost no borders, zero nested cards.
Restrained motion everywhere except the Lanyard.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Signal Gold appears on ≤10% of any given screen. There is exactly one filled gold button per view (GitHub); everything else is ghost.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black Rule
rules.body: The canvas is #0B0B0C, never #000. Pure black is forbidden.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Name Rule
rules.body: The display name is always exactly two lines: first name roman off-white, last name italic gold.

rules.name: The Mono-For-Machines Rule
rules.body: Metadata is monospace uppercase; prose is grotesque; voice (name, tagline, titles) is serif. Never mix the roles.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No box-shadow, no backdrop-filter, no neon glow. Reach for spacing, not shadow.

dos: Do keep the canvas tinted near-black (#0B0B0C) under a single fixed faint graph-paper grid overlay.
Do render the display name as two lines: first name roman Off-White, last name italic Signal Gold.
Do reserve Signal Gold (#C9A227) for ≤10% of any screen and exactly one filled button (GitHub).
Do build Projects and Experience as clean lists, leaning on scale and whitespace for hierarchy.
Do use monospace uppercase for all metadata and cap body text at ~70ch.
Do keep motion restrained and let the Lanyard be the only spectacle.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: freeze the ticker, scroll-in animations, and Lanyard auto-motion.
donts: Don't use pure black (#000); the tint on #0B0B0C is the point.
Don't use Inter or system-default fonts for display or body.
Don't use glassmorphism — no frosted translucent panels or backdrop-filter blurs.
Don't nest cards inside cards, or default to a card grid where a list reads better.
Don't add dark-mode neon glows or box-shadow drops; this system is flat with tonal layering.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing; ease-out only, small distances.
